pi_items.source: Web search for curve name references - no public DX curve library entry found

Web search for DOE-2.2 DX EIR-FPLR quadratic coefficients - no published source found matching these exact values. Related values found: [0.24258, 0.41468, 0.34274] for chillers, standard linear [0.85, 0.15] for PLF
Direct inspection of 4StoreyBuilding.inp file - verified via grep and file content reading. The actual system name uses G.S11 (two-digit suffix), not G.S1
Direct inspection of 4StoreyBuilding.inp file - verified via grep. The actual system name uses G.E12 (two-digit suffix), not G.E2
Direct inspection of 4StoreyBuilding.inp file - verified via grep. The actual system name uses G.N13 (two-digit suffix), not G.N3
Direct inspection of 4StoreyBuilding.inp file - verified via grep. The actual system name uses G.W14 (two-digit suffix), not G.W4
Direct inspection of 4StoreyBuilding.inp file - verified via grep. The actual system name uses G.C15 (two-digit suffix), not C.C5
Standard DOE-2.2 parameter name for cooling energy input ratio function of part-load ratio, confirmed in verifier.py and export_result.ps1 scripts
File exists at examples/equest_env/data/4StoreyBuilding.inp (3258 lines). Confirmed to contain exactly 5 Ground Floor systems with PSZ type
env.json specification confirms Windows 11 base OS and eQUEST 3.65 as simulation tool

pi_items.verified_value: Local synthetic test data file (no external download)
pi_items.source: 4StoreyBuilding.inp is a local file in examples/equest_env/data/ directory. Setup scripts (setup_task.ps1) reference local file paths, not download URLs. File appears to be a reference model for testing

privileged_info_summary: The task involves creating a quadratic curve named 'HighEff_DX_PLR' with coefficients [0.085, 0.250, 0.665] and assigning it to 5 Ground Floor PSZ HVAC systems in a 4-story office building model (4StoreyBuilding) simulated in eQUEST 3.65 (DOE-2.2). Critical discrepancy: The metadata lists target systems as G.S1, G.E2, G.N3, G.W4, G.C5, but the actual system names in the building model file are G.S11, G.E12, G.N13, G.W14, G.C15. The curve coefficients are not found in any published DX unit performance databases and appear to be synthetic. The building model file is local synthetic test data.
